body.concept: A central orchestrator LLM analyzes the task, breaks it into subtasks dynamically, delegates each to a worker LLM, then synthesizes results. Unlike prompt chaining (fixed steps) or parallelization (predetermined splits), the orchestrator decides at runtime what work needs to happen.
body.analogy: Like a project manager who reads a brief, creates a task list on the fly, assigns tasks to specialists, then assembles their deliverables into a final product. The task list isn't known in advance — it depends on the brief.
body.visual: Center box 'Orchestrator LLM' with arrows going out to multiple 'Worker LLM' boxes. Arrows return from workers to orchestrator. The orchestrator has a thought bubble: 'What subtasks do I need?'
